home.title: A job-search CRM on top of Google Sheets
home.description: Track vacancies, applications, pipeline stages, interviews, offers, and dashboard metrics from one focused Nuxt application.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A future overview of applications, active processes, interviews, offers, and next actions.

vacancies.title: Vacancies
vacancies.description: A typed workspace for table and kanban views backed by stable status IDs.

sheets.title: Google Sheets
sheets.description: The first data source remains Google Sheets, isolated behind repositories and validation.
